days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Yasmin's Program
days.description: 5 km easy, then full Ankle & Hips program. Let the calves settle.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Conversational pace throughout — if you can't hold a sentence, slow down.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.how_to: Full extension at the top; slow controlled return.

exercises.name: Calf Press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Balls of feet on weight plate edge, barbell on upper back. Rise to toes; controlled descent.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Seated Calf Raise
exercises.how_to: On leg extension machine. Should feel hard. Work each leg individually.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.how_to: Ankle cuff on lower cable. Drive outer leg to ~45°; slow return. Both sides.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.how_to: Curl to buttocks; 1-second pause at top; slow controlled release.

exercises.name: Leg Extension (Single Leg)
exercises.how_to: One leg at a time. Full controlled extension.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; front knee tracks over toes. Progress weight each session.

exercises.name: Pogo Jumps
exercises.how_to: Two-footed jumps on the spot. Minimal ground contact — light and springy on balls of feet.

exercises.name: Pogo Hops (Single-Leg)
exercises.how_to: Single-leg hops building gradually to 30+. Stop immediately if calf pain increases.

days.name: Easy Run
days.description: 5 km easy. Note how the calves feel — any tightness building?

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Conversational pace. Pay attention to how the calves respond.

days.name: Easy + Yasmin's Program
days.description: 5 km easy, then full Ankle & Hips program.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.how_to: Full extension at the top; slow controlled return.

exercises.name: Calf Press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Balls of feet on weight plate edge, barbell on upper back. Rise to toes; controlled descent.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Seated Calf Raise
exercises.how_to: On leg extension machine. Should feel hard. Work each leg individually.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.how_to: Ankle cuff on lower cable. Drive outer leg to ~45°; slow return. Both sides.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.how_to: Curl to buttocks; 1-second pause at top; slow controlled release.

exercises.name: Leg Extension (Single Leg)
exercises.how_to: One leg at a time. Full controlled extension.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; front knee tracks over toes.

exercises.name: Pogo Jumps
exercises.how_to: Two-footed. Minimal ground contact; light and springy.

exercises.name: Pogo Hops (Single-Leg)
exercises.how_to: Building gradually to 30+. Stop if calf pain increases.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Strides + Yasmin's Program
days.description: 6 km easy with 4 × 20s strides, then Ankle & Hips program.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Conversational pace. Calves should be settling by now.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Relaxed accelerations at the end of the run. Full recovery walk between each.

exercises.name: Calf Press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Balls of feet on weight plate; rise to toes, controlled descent.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Seated Calf Raise
exercises.how_to: On leg extension machine. Should feel hard.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.how_to: Drive outer leg to ~45°; slow return. Both sides.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.how_to: 1-second pause at top; slow controlled release.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; front knee tracks toes.

exercises.name: Pogo Jumps
exercises.how_to: Minimal ground contact; light and springy.

days.name: Intervals — 4 × 800 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 4 × 800 m @ 3:25–3:30/km (90s jog recovery) + 2 km cooldown. ~8 km. First quality session back — stop if calf tightness builds.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Let the body ease in.

exercises.name: 4 × 800 m
exercises.how_to: Hard effort — HR 165–175. 90s jog recovery between reps. Stop immediately if calves tighten.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Note how calves feel afterwards.

days.name: Easy + Yasmin's Program
days.description: 6 km easy, then Ankle & Hips program.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Conversational pace. Recovery from yesterday's intervals.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Tempo Run
days.description: 2 km warmup + 18 min @ 3:45–3:50/km + 2 km cooldown. ~7 km.

exercises.name: Tempo
exercises.how_to: Comfortably hard — you can speak a few words but not hold a conversation. HR ~155–165.

days.name: Easy Long Run
days.description: 10 km @ 5:00–5:15/km. Conversational throughout.

exercises.name: Long Run
exercises.how_to: Conversational pace the whole way. This builds aerobic base — don't push it.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Strides + Yasmin's Program
days.description: 6 km easy with 6 × 20s strides, then Ankle & Hips program.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Relaxed accelerations. Full recovery walk between each.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; front knee tracks toes.

days.name: Intervals — 5 × 1000 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 5 × 1000 m @ 3:25–3:30/km (90s jog) + 2 km cooldown. ~9 km. Hardest session of the plan.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Take your time warming up.

exercises.name: 5 × 1000 m
exercises.how_to: Hard effort — HR 165–175. 90s jog recovery. These are 1000m reps so pace yourself; don't go out too fast on rep 1.

days.name: Easy + Yasmin's Program
days.description: 6 km easy, then Ankle & Hips program.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Easy recovery run after yesterday's hard session.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Tempo Run
days.description: 2 km warmup + 20 min @ 3:40–3:45/km + 2 km cooldown. ~8 km.

exercises.name: Tempo
exercises.how_to: Comfortably hard. A touch faster than Week 2. HR ~155–165.

days.name: Easy Long Run
days.description: 10 km @ 5:00–5:15/km. Conversational throughout.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Strides + Yasmin's Program
days.description: 6 km easy with 6 × 20s strides, then Ankle & Hips program.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Relaxed accelerations. Full recovery walk between each.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; front knee tracks toes.

days.name: Intervals — 5 × 1000 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 5 × 1000 m @ 3:25–3:30/km (90s jog) + 2 km cooldown. ~9 km. Last big interval session.

exercises.name: 5 × 1000 m
exercises.how_to: Hard. This is the last big interval session before the race — make it count. 90s jog recovery.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. That's the hard work done.

days.name: Easy + Yasmin's Program
days.description: 6 km easy, then Ankle & Hips program.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Tempo Run
days.description: 2 km warmup + 20 min @ 3:40/km + 2 km cooldown. ~8 km.

exercises.name: Tempo
exercises.how_to: This is the sharpest tempo of the block. Comfortably hard — HR ~160–165.

days.name: Easy Run
days.description: 8 km @ 5:00–5:15/km. Volume starts dropping from here.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Conversational. Last longer easy run before the taper.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Strides + Yasmin's (Light)
days.description: 5 km easy + 4 × 20s strides, then Ankle & Hips at 2 sets each, weight -20%.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Relaxed accelerations. Full recovery between each.

days.name: Sharpener — 4 × 800 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 4 × 800 m @ 3:22–3:28/km (2 min jog) + 2 km cooldown. ~8 km. Legs should feel fast.

exercises.name: 4 × 800 m
exercises.how_to: Sharpener pace — slightly faster than the build phase. 2 min jog recovery. Legs should feel quick.

days.name: Easy + Yasmin's (Light)
days.description: 5 km easy, then Ankle & Hips at 2 sets each, weight -20%.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Strides
days.description: 4 km easy + 4 × 20s strides @ race pace. Stay loose.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Race pace. Relaxed — should feel controlled and fast at the same time.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest. Legs up.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Strides + Yasmin's (Minimal)
days.description: 4 km easy + 4 × 20s strides, then 1 set of calf press, single-leg calf raise and pogos only.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Very easy. Just keep the legs moving.

exercises.name: Calf Press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Maintain the Achilles habit. Nothing that causes soreness.

days.name: Shakeout Run
days.description: 3 km very easy. Just moving the legs.

exercises.name: Shakeout
exercises.how_to: Very easy jog. No effort at all.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Optional 15 min walk or gentle jog.

days.name: Easy + Strides
days.description: 3 km easy + 4 × 20s strides @ race pace. Stay loose.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Strides + Yasmin's (1 set)
days.description: 4 km easy + 4 × 20s strides, then 1 set of calf press and pogos only. Nothing that causes soreness.

days.name: Shakeout Run
days.description: 3 km very easy. Just moving the legs.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Prep race kit. Pin number on. Vaporflys out.

days.name: RACE — Battersea Park Run
days.description: Sub 17:00. Target 3:24/km. First km should feel easy — aim 3:22–3:25, then settle. Empty the tank after km 4.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: 10 min easy jog before the start. Don't sprint the first 200m.

exercises.name: Km 1
exercises.how_to: Should feel surprisingly easy. Resist the urge to go faster.

exercises.name: Km 2–4
exercises.how_to: Settle into race pace. Controlled and strong.

exercises.name: Km 5
exercises.how_to: If you have anything left after km 4, give everything you have.
